violations.text: Shrimp and fish were observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the upstairs ice machine have an accumulation of residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The receptacle in the toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: 1. wall behind pre-rinse hose at dish machine 2. interior of dishmachine frame hood (chipped paint) New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The kitchen hood vents were observed with an accumulation of grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
